_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design and develop continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) in a containerized or other reproducible computing environment to support the machine learning life cycle.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continuous integration principles, automated testing integration, artifact management, deployment automation patterns, and environment promotion strategies.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-025 (AI, cosine: 0.594), AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.593).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.570). Shared vocabulary: [cd, ci, continuous, environment, integration]. DCWF-only terms [computing, containerized, cycle, delivery, design, develop] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.862, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Design and develop continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) in a conta" and "Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.605 ≈ STS 0.570 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cd, ci, continuous, environment, integration] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [cd, ci, continuous, environment, integration]. DCWF-only: [computing, containerized, cycle, delivery, design, develop]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, data].
